final.title: Be part of transforming education across Africa

hero.title: About Santos Creations Educational Foundation (SCEF)
hero.subtitle: SCEF is a membership-driven Pan-African education foundation strengthening education delivery through governance systems, digital access and certification, media knowledge dissemination, compliant local chapters, accountable funding partnerships, and scalable impact aligned with the UN SDGs and AU Agenda 2063.

who.title: Who We Are
who.body: Santos Creations Educational Foundation (SCEF) builds a structured, continent-wide education ecosystem that helps education grow in quality, reach, and accountability. We connect people, programs, platforms, partners, and local chapters to deliver measurable learning outcomes, trusted credentials, and sustainable education support across Africa and the diaspora.

objectives.title: Our 6 Core Objectives
items: Establish layered governance for education delivery.
Deploy digital platforms for access and certification.
Onboard and monitor local chapters for compliance.
Secure funding and partnerships with accountability.
Align operations with UN SDGs and AU Agenda 2063 for scalability.

history.title: Our History
history.body: SCEF has evolved over time into a pan-African membership-driven platform — supporting education systems through programs, media, local chapters, and accountable partnerships.

vision.title: Vision 2035
vision.body: By 2035, SCEF aims to support a continuously improving education standard across Africa — strengthening chapter action, inclusion, trusted certification, and ethical funding with credible impact reporting.

sustainability.title: Sustainability, SDGs & Agenda 2063
sustainability.body: SCEF designs programs for measurable social impact, long-term transparency, and genuine inclusion — aligned with SDG 4, related SDGs, and the African Union's Agenda 2063.
sustainability.csrFundsBody: We help partners structure, deploy, and track CSR funds for education — with governance, execution oversight, and impact reporting.

programs.title: Our 6 Programs
programs.intro: SCEF delivers impact through six flagship programs designed to work together on access, quality, inclusion, skills, and recognition.

cards.nesa: New Education Standard Award Africa (NESA Africa) — Recognizing and amplifying educational excellence.
cards.eduaid: Education Aid Africa (EduAid Africa) — Scholarships, support pathways, and education funding.
cards.rmsa: Rebuild My School Africa (RMSA) — School renewal and learning environment improvement.
cards.eoa: Education Online Africa (EOA) — Digital learning and verifiable certification.
cards.womenGirls: Women & Girls Education — Targeted interventions for access and outcomes.
cards.specialNeeds: Special Needs Education Support — Inclusion and support for learners.

eoaSpotlight.title: Education Online Africa (EOA): Learn. Get Certified. Renew.
eoaSpotlight.body: EOA helps learners build practical skills, earn verifiable credentials, and renew every 24 months. Pathways include ACDL and AWPC, plus an exam portal with integrity controls.

items.exec: Governance & Executive Office — Executive Secretary (Legal & Governance) + PRO
items.sobcd: SOBCD — Admin, HR, finance oversight, events, training, compliance
items.tdsd: TDSD — Web/App, CMS, database, security, analytics, wallet-ready systems
items.ombdd: OMBDD — Fundraising comms, sponsors, growth, partnership pipeline
items.lcs: Local Chapter Services Division (LCS) — Activation, support, governance, reporting

trust.title: Governance & Trust
trust.body: SCEF maintains structured governance and accountability through boards, policies, and transparent impact reporting.

final.title: Join the transformation of education in Africa

hero.title: Governed for Trust. Structured for Scale.
hero.subtitle: The Board Governance & Executive Office (BGEO) is the apex governance division providing institutional leadership, fiduciary oversight, and strategic direction for all SCEF operations across Africa.

bgeo.title: BGEO Division
bgeo.body: The Board Governance & Executive Office serves as the institutional nerve center, coordinating board activities, executive leadership, and ensuring SCEF delivers on its pan-African education mandate with integrity and accountability.
bgeo.whyBody: Africa's education sector has suffered from fragmented initiatives and weak oversight. SCEF's governance model provides clear accountability, transparent decision-making, and institutional continuity.

layers.title: Four-Layer Governance Structure
layers.subtitle: Each layer has clear mandates, accountability lines, and operational scope ensuring transparent and effective governance.

bot.title: Board of Trustees (BOT)
bot.description: The highest governing body responsible for fiduciary oversight, institutional integrity, and strategic direction of the Foundation.

boa.title: Boards of Advisors (BOA)
boa.description: Expert advisory panels providing specialized guidance on program delivery and chapter operations.

bod.title: Regional Boards of Directors (BOD)
bod.description: Operational governance ensuring regional program execution and adherence to institutional standards.

lcps.title: Local Chapter Presidents (LCPs)
lcps.description: On-ground leadership executing programs and managing community engagement at country level.

management.title: Executive Management Team
management.subtitle: SCEF's executive leadership oversees the six operational divisions, ensuring coordinated delivery of our pan-African education mandate.

orgSecretary.title: Organization Secretary
orgSecretary.description: Provides institutional leadership, legal counsel, and ensures governance compliance across all SCEF operations.

pro.title: Public Relations Officer (PRO)
pro.description: Manages institutional communications, media relations, and stakeholder engagement strategies.

operations.title: Director of Operations
operations.description: Oversees strategic operations, business compliance, and institutional risk management.

technology.title: Director of Technology
technology.description: Leads digital infrastructure, platform development, and technology-enabled education delivery.

mediaBusiness.title: Director of Media Business
mediaBusiness.description: Drives digital growth, sponsorship acquisition, and online brand development.

santosMedia.title: Director of Santos Media
santosMedia.description: Manages broadcasting, content production, and media platform operations.

chapterServices.title: Director of Chapter Services
chapterServices.description: Supports local chapters with onboarding, compliance, and operational guidance.

policies.title: Policies & Compliance
policies.subtitle: SCEF maintains comprehensive governance policies ensuring transparency, accountability, and ethical operations.

ethics.title: Code of Ethics
ethics.desc: Standards for trustees, staff, and volunteers

antiCorruption.title: Anti-Corruption Policy
antiCorruption.desc: Zero tolerance for fraud and corruption

contact.title: Contact Leadership
contact.subtitle: For governance inquiries, partnership discussions, or institutional engagement, reach out to our leadership team.

cta.title: Partner with Africa's Education Platform
cta.subtitle: Join governments, donors, and organizations already collaborating with SCEF to transform education across Africa.

hero.title: How SCEF Works
hero.subtitle: SCEF is structured into six divisions to deliver governance, programs, media, chapters, compliance, and partnerships at scale.

bgeo.title: Board Governance & Executive Office
bgeo.mandate: Board coordination, governance documentation, executive office support, institutional communications, and governance continuity.

sobcd.title: Strategic Operations & Business Compliance Division
sobcd.mandate: Admin & HR, finance operations oversight, events management, internal/external training coordination, compliance systems, operational reporting.

tdsd.title: Technology & Digital Services Division
tdsd.lead: Director of Technology and Digital Innovation
tdsd.mandate: Website/app systems, databases, security, dashboards, multilingual systems, platform performance, and digital transformation delivery.

ombdd.title: Online Media Business Development Division
ombdd.mandate: Fundraising communications, sponsorship pipelines, digital growth, campaigns, partnerships conversion support, donor engagement assets.

santosMedia.title: Santos Media Division
santosMedia.mandate: NESA Africa TV, It's In Me Radio, webinars/podcasts, education tourism show, content operations, editorial standards, media distribution.

lcs.title: Local Chapter Services Division
lcs.lead: Director of Chapter Services and Support
lcs.mandate: Onboarding, monitoring, compliance support, reporting systems, local chapter governance, and scalable chapter activation.

hero.subtitle: SCEF delivers impact through flagship programs designed to work together on access, quality, inclusion, skills, and recognition.

hero.title: SCEF Local Chapters
hero.subtitle: Our network of local chapters brings SCEF's mission to communities across Africa and the diaspora, activating grassroots education transformation.

about.title: About Local Chapters
about.body: SCEF Local Chapters are community-based units that execute programs, engage stakeholders, and drive education impact at the local level. Each chapter operates under SCEF governance with support from the Local Chapter Services Division.

hero.title: SCEF Media — Knowledge Dissemination Engine
hero.subtitle: SCEF Media supports Objective 3 by publishing verified education content and storytelling across Africa and the diaspora—through video, radio programs, webinars, podcasts, documentaries, and education tourism content.

nesaTv.description: Broadcasting education excellence, award ceremonies, and educational content across Africa.
